paper_title: Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Parallel-Group, Multicenter, Phase 3 Trial of 300IR 5-Grass Pollen Tablet

methods.description: The study design outlines the structure and protocol of a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, parallel-group, multicenter, Phase 3 trial conducted to evaluate the efficacy of the 300IR 5-grass pollen tablet over a period of 5 years.

steps.description: Patients were randomized 1:1:1 using a computer-generated list to either placebo or 300IR 5-grass pollen tablet.
steps.searchable_summary: randomize patients into treatment groups using a computer-generated list

steps.description: The 300IR 5-grass pollen tablet was administered according to a discontinuous pre- and coseasonal protocol beginning at 4 or 2 months prior to the expected start of the grass pollen season and maintained until season's end.
steps.searchable_summary: administer treatment according to pre- and coseasonal protocol

steps.description: The study protocol was reviewed and approved by local regulatory authorities and independent ethics committees in each country.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain regulatory and ethical approval for study protocol

steps.description: Patients provided their written informed consent before the start of any study-associated procedure.

methods.description: The study population section describes the demographics and baseline characteristics of the patients involved in the trial, including their randomization into treatment groups and the severity of their symptoms.

steps.description: Demographics and baseline characteristics for the FAS Year 4 have already been published.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve published demographics and baseline characteristics for FAS Year 4

steps.description: Data from FAS Year 5 were well-balanced and comparable across treatment groups.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze FAS Year 5 data for balance and comparability across treatment groups
outputs: analysis of data balance and comparability

steps.description: Randomized patients in the FAS Year 5 had moderate-to-severe grass pollen-associated ARC.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze severity of ARC in randomized patients for FAS Year 5

steps.description: Mean ARTSS scores for patients who discontinued after year 4 were compared with those who continued into year 5.
steps.searchable_summary: compare ARTSS scores between patients who discontinued and those who continued
